annotations.label: Kronecker delta

anchor.snippet: the Kronecker delta (named after Leopold Kronecker ) is a function of two variables

annotations.note: Mathlib has no standalone `kroneckerDelta` constant; the standard `if i = j then 1 else 0` form appears as `Matrix.one_apply`.

annotations.label: Identity matrix entries as Kronecker delta

anchor.snippet: identity matrix

annotations.note: `Matrix.one_apply` states `(1 : Matrix n n α) i j = if i = j then 1 else 0`, exactly the Kronecker delta entry formula.

annotations.label: Inner product via Kronecker delta

anchor.snippet: the inner product of vectors can be written as

annotations.note: `orthonormal_iff_ite` characterizes orthonormality by `⟪v i, v j⟫ = if i = j then 1 else 0`, the Kronecker-delta inner-product identity.

annotations.label: Delta as identity matrix

anchor.snippet: the matrix δ can be considered as an identity matrix

annotations.note: `Matrix.one_apply_eq`/`Matrix.one_apply_ne` give the diagonal/off-diagonal entries of the identity matrix, identifying it with the Kronecker delta.

annotations.label: Geometric series representation

anchor.snippet: Another useful representation is the following form

annotations.note: No Mathlib decl expresses the Kronecker delta as a limit/average of a geometric series of roots of unity.

annotations.label: Iverson bracket notation

anchor.snippet: Using the Iverson bracket

annotations.note: Mathlib has no `Iverson` bracket notation; only the explicit `if ... then 1 else 0` pattern is used.

annotations.label: Single-argument notation

anchor.snippet: a single-argument notation

annotations.note: No Mathlib decl introduces the single-argument δ_{i−j} notation for the Kronecker delta.

annotations.label: Substitution tensor

anchor.snippet: Sometimes the Kronecker delta is called the substitution tensor

annotations.note: The terminology 'substitution tensor' is absent from Mathlib.

annotations.label: Unit sample function

anchor.snippet: the Kronecker delta function sometimes means the unit sample function

annotations.note: Mathlib has no DSP unit-sample function distinct from the generic indicator/if-then-else.

annotations.label: Discrete unit sample function

anchor.snippet: The discrete unit sample function is more simply defined as

annotations.note: No dedicated DSP discrete-unit-sample function exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Dirac delta function

anchor.snippet: The Dirac delta is defined as

annotations.note: `MeasureTheory.Measure.dirac` defines the Dirac delta as a measure concentrated at a point, the standard measure-theoretic formalization.

annotations.label: Sifting property

anchor.snippet: The Kronecker delta has the so-called sifting property

annotations.note: `Finset.sum_ite_eq'` evaluates `∑ i, (if i = j then a j else 0)` to `a j`, exactly the Kronecker delta sifting identity.

annotations.label: Multiplicative identity of incidence algebra

anchor.snippet: forms the multiplicative identity element of an incidence algebra

annotations.note: `IncidenceAlgebra.one_apply` shows the multiplicative unit of the incidence algebra is the Kronecker-delta function `if a = b then 1 else 0`.

annotations.label: Elementary recursive function

anchor.snippet: The Kronecker delta is an elementary recursive function

annotations.note: Mathlib does not develop the elementary-recursive-functions hierarchy with the Kronecker delta as an instance.

annotations.label: Probability mass function via Kronecker delta

anchor.section: Relationship to the Dirac delta function
anchor.snippet: the probability mass function

annotations.note: `PMF.pure_apply` gives `pure a a' = if a' = a then 1 else 0`, the Kronecker-delta probability mass function concentrated at a point.

annotations.label: Probability density function via Dirac delta

anchor.section: Relationship to the Dirac delta function
anchor.snippet: the probability density function

annotations.note: Mathlib formalizes the Dirac measure (`MeasureTheory.Measure.dirac`) but not specifically as a probability density via the Dirac delta distribution.

annotations.label: Kronecker from sampled Dirac delta

anchor.section: Relationship to the Dirac delta function
anchor.snippet: the Kronecker delta can arise from sampling a Dirac delta function

annotations.note: Mathlib does not formalize the discrete sampling identity δ_ij = δ(i−j) connecting Kronecker and Dirac deltas.

annotations.label: Kronecker tensor

anchor.snippet: the Kronecker tensor can be written

annotations.note: Mathlib has no formalization of the mixed (1,1) Kronecker delta tensor δ^i_j as a tensor; `Matrix.kroneckerMap` is the unrelated Kronecker product.

annotations.label: Generalized Kronecker delta

anchor.snippet: The generalized Kronecker delta or multi-index Kronecker delta

annotations.note: The multi-index generalized Kronecker delta is not defined in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Generalized Kronecker delta by indices

anchor.section: Definitions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: In terms of the indices, the generalized Kronecker delta is defined as

annotations.note: No index-based definition of the generalized Kronecker delta exists in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Definition via symmetric group

anchor.section: Definitions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: be the symmetric group of degree

annotations.note: Mathlib lacks the symmetric-group-based definition of the generalized Kronecker delta.

annotations.label: Definition via anti-symmetrization

anchor.section: Definitions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: Using anti-symmetrization

annotations.note: No anti-symmetrization-based definition of the generalized Kronecker delta is in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Definition via determinant

anchor.section: Definitions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: In terms of a

annotations.note: Mathlib does not define the generalized Kronecker delta as a minor/determinant of identity entries.

annotations.label: Recursive definition via Laplace expansion

anchor.section: Definitions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: it may be defined recursively

annotations.note: No recursive Laplace-expansion definition of the generalized Kronecker delta is present in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Definition via Levi-Civita symbol

anchor.section: Definitions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: in terms of the Levi-Civita symbol

annotations.note: Mathlib has no Levi-Civita symbol, hence no definition of the generalized Kronecker delta in those terms.

annotations.label: Contraction formula

anchor.section: Contractions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: Kronecker Delta contractions depend on the dimension of the space

annotations.note: Dimension-dependent contraction identities for the generalized Kronecker delta are not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Full contracted delta

anchor.section: Contractions of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: the full contracted delta is obtained as

annotations.note: The full contraction `n!/(n−p)!` identity for the generalized Kronecker delta is not formalized.

annotations.label: Anti-symmetrization with generalized delta

anchor.section: Properties of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: The generalized Kronecker delta may be used for anti-symmetrization

annotations.note: `MultilinearMap.alternatization` formalizes anti-symmetrization via `∑ σ, sign σ • ...`, the same construction the generalized Kronecker delta encodes.

annotations.label: Properties of generalized Kronecker delta

anchor.section: Properties of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: we can derive the properties of the generalized Kronecker delta

annotations.note: Properties of the generalized Kronecker delta are absent from Mathlib since the object itself is not defined.

annotations.label: Cauchy–Binet formula equivalence

anchor.section: Properties of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: equivalent to the Cauchy–Binet formula

annotations.note: The square-matrix case of Cauchy–Binet is `Matrix.det_mul`; the rectangular Cauchy–Binet identity itself does not have a dedicated Mathlib decl.

annotations.label: Order reduction via summation

anchor.section: Properties of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: Reducing the order via summation of the indices may be expressed by the identity

annotations.note: Index-summation order-reduction identities for the generalized Kronecker delta are not in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Summation rule for Levi-Civita symbol

anchor.section: Properties of the generalized Kronecker delta
anchor.snippet: the summation rule of the Levi-Civita symbol is derived

annotations.note: Mathlib does not formalize a Levi-Civita symbol or its summation rule.

annotations.label: Contour integral representation

anchor.snippet: the Kronecker delta can be written as a complex contour integral

annotations.note: No Mathlib decl writes the Kronecker delta as a complex contour integral of `z^(n−m−1)/2πi`.

annotations.label: Kronecker comb

anchor.snippet: The Kronecker comb function with period

annotations.note: Mathlib has no Kronecker comb (periodic Kronecker delta) function.
